title: wcr proof-section v0.1
description: Schema for the [package.metadata.nros.proof] table in a Rust crate's Cargo.toml (or the [proof] section in a non-Cargo wcr.toml). Frozen at Phase 211.1 (2026-06-01); compatible additive extensions land via minor schema versions.

schema_version.description: Schema version this manifest conforms to.

kind.description: Package class. Default 'code' (normal crate with extracted spec). 'axiom' packages ship hand-authored axiom theories with no impl + an attestor field.

language.description: Implementation language of this package. Drives extractor selection.

covered_versions.description: (axiom-class only) version ranges of the upstream dep this axiom crate's theory covers.

tools.description: Pinned tool versions used to produce this package's proof artifacts.

extractor.description: Name + version of the extractor (e.g. creusot-0.10.0, frama-c-wp-30).

verifier.description: Why3 version used to discharge VCs (e.g. why3-1.7.0).

provers.description: List of provers tried during discharge, each name-version-pinned.

composition.description: Theory exports + imports + axiom deps for cross-crate composition.

emits.description: Why3 theory names auto-discovered by Creusot extraction, exported to consumers.

axiom_deps.description: T1 shadow axiom crates (per M3 policy) — used by ≥ 3 nano-ros crates.

attestor.description: Optional override of the default attestor identity.

local_axioms.description: T2 local axiom files (per M3 policy) — used by 1-2 nano-ros crates only.

spec_hashes.description: SHA-256 of canonical-normalized extracted .mlw file per emitted theory. Auto-populated by `wcr extract`. Hash prefix includes extractor version to surface Creusot-bump invalidations.

attestation.description: Attestation evidence file paths (relative to package root).

provenance_file.description: Path to SLSA provenance attestation (in-toto v1 statement).

sigstore_bundle.description: (Post-PoC, 211.8) — path to sigstore signing bundle. Omit in PoC; reserved.

attestor.description: (axiom-class only) — identity claiming the axiom holds. DID URL or sigstore identity reference. Required for kind="axiom".
